description_long: This rifle features a distinctive bullpup configuration with an olive drab polymer outer shell and a robust black metal frame. The upper receiver is encased in a protective shroud with angular cutouts, and a digital ammunition counter is prominently displayed on the side. The weapon includes a vertical foregrip for enhanced control, and the magazine is integrated behind the pistol grip, characteristic of bullpup designs. The barrel is relatively short and compact, with a vented handguard and a visible muzzle device at the front. The stock is fixed and streamlined, contributing to the weapon's compact profile, making it suitable for urban environments.
description: A compact bullpup rifle with an olive drab shell, black metal frame, digital ammo counter, and vertical foregrip. Its fixed stock and short barrel make it ideal for urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the olive drab shell, digital ammo counter, vertical foregrip, and the full length of the rifle.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel opening, handguard, and the narrow profile of the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the bullpup configuration, magazine placement, and the streamlined stock.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the fixed stock, rear sight area, and the compact width of the rifle.
